generationRules.fieldNaming: Use English camelCase field paths and Chinese fieldLabel/title for Chinese prompts.
generationRules.sampleData: expectedDataSource.sampleData is required and must match the generated fields.
generationRules.pageInference: Use deterministic domain profiles supplied by the client/server plan; do not default receipts or labels to A4.
generationRules.tableData: Array/detail-list fields must use table-data with table.topology rows/cells, not legacy props.columns or repeatTemplate.

text.description: Text block for static labels and data-bound scalar fields.
usage: Use props.content for static text and placeholders such as {#fieldLabel}.
Use binding for dynamic scalar fields; keep fieldPath slash-separated.

line.description: Straight separator line. The element width and height define line length and thickness.
usage: Use for receipt separators, section rules, and simple borders.
Do not use legacy stroke, strokeWidth, x1, y1, x2, or y2 props.

table-data.description: Dynamic data table for arrays such as receipt items, invoice lines, and order details.
usage: Use table-data whenever the template has an array/detail-list field.
Header cells use content.text. Repeat-template cells use binding with absolute slash-separated paths such as items/name.
Do not use legacy type table, props.columns, props.repeatTemplate, headerStyle, rowStyle, or borderStyle.
schemaRules: Element must include table.topology.columns as normalized ratios that sum to 1.
Element must include table.topology.rows with a header row and a repeat-template row for array data.
Element must include table.layout with borderAppearance, borderWidth, borderType, and borderColor.

table-static.description: Fixed table for forms, headers, and non-repeating grid layouts.
usage: Use table-static only when row count is fixed and not driven by an array.
Cells use content.text for static labels or staticBinding for independent scalar fields.
schemaRules: Element must include table.topology.columns and table.topology.rows.

image.description: Image block for logos, product images, stamps, and externally supplied image URLs.
usage: Use fit contain for logos and cover for cropped photos.
Bind image fields only when the data source provides an image URL.

qrcode.description: QR code generated from props.value or a bound text/URL field.
usage: Use for payment URLs, receipt verification URLs, and label traceability links.
Keep width and height equal for square codes.

barcode.description: Barcode generated from props.value or a bound code field.
usage: Use CODE128 for generic order numbers and EAN13/EAN8 for retail goods codes.

rect.description: Rectangle shape for borders, backgrounds, frames, and simple visual blocks.
usage: Use fillColor and borderColor; do not use legacy fill or stroke props.

ellipse.description: Ellipse or circle shape for badges, seals, and simple decoration.
usage: Use sparingly; prefer text, line, and table-data for document structure.

container.description: Container that owns child material nodes for grouped layout.
usage: Use children for grouped elements only when hierarchy is needed.
Absolute positioning still applies to the container itself.

page-number.description: Automatic page number display for paginated fixed documents.
usage: Use for A4 reports, invoices, and documents that can span pages.
Usually unnecessary for narrow receipts and labels.

svg.description: Inline SVG vector block for simple custom marks and decorative vectors.
usage: Use only when a simple vector mark is needed; prefer built-in shape materials for basic geometry.

chart.description: Chart visualization for report templates with numeric series data.
usage: Use only for analytic reports; do not use for receipts, invoices, labels, or plain tables.

bindingRules.fieldPathFormat: Slash-separated path from data source root, for example items/name or store/address.
bindingRules.sourceIdFormat: References a DataSourceDescriptor id. Use one stable generated sourceId consistently in schema bindings.

bindingTypes.description: Standard element or table-data repeat-template cell binding.
table-static cell binding for fixed independent scalar values.

tableRules.repeatTemplateBinding: table-data repeat-template cells use binding. Header cells use content.text. All repeat-template cell paths should share the same array prefix, such as items/*.
tableRules.staticBindingUsage: table-static cells use staticBinding only when a fixed cell needs data. Do not put staticBinding on normal text elements.
